summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Courses feature in admin dashboard. All backend APIs (16/16) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Courses menu positioned correctly above Assessments, course CRUD operations functional, filters and search working.
passed_tests: Backend assessment management (create, get, bulk register)
Frontend Courses menu item in sidebar (positioned above Assessments)
Frontend course list page with filter tabs (All, Active, Disabled)
Frontend Add Course button and form
Frontend course creation with dark banner header
Frontend course table with all required columns (Image, Title, Code, Description, Total Quiz, Date, Added By, Status)
Frontend Back to Course List button
Frontend course creation and display integration
